title: Refactoring Advice Graph
description: Describes a Refactoring Advice Graph that may lead to a human-readable advice for a refactoring in software code.

refactoringName.title: Refactoring Name
refactoringName.description: The name of the Refactoring that is described by the Refactoring Advice Graph

nodes.title: Nodes
nodes.description: The nodes in the Refactoring Advice Graph
